_meta.description: Mapping of finding types to Article 21(2) risk-management measures in the EU NIS2 Directive. References are the relevant sub-paragraphs of Article 21(2), which lists the minimum cybersecurity risk-management measures required of essential and important entities.

S3_PUBLIC_VIA_ACL.label: Access control policies and asset management

S3_PUBLIC_ACCESS_BLOCK_DISABLED.label: Security in the acquisition, development and maintenance of network and information systems

S3_ENCRYPTION_DISABLED.label: Policies and procedures regarding the use of cryptography and encryption
